use_cases: Primary call-to-action button for forms and dialogs
Destructive action triggers with variant styling
Navigation links styled as buttons with the link variant
Icon-only buttons for compact UI toolbars using the icon size variant
ai_summary: A versatile atomic button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, small, large, icon). Supports Radix UI slot pattern via asChild prop for composition. Features keyboard accessibility with focus-visible ring states and disabled opacity states. Built with class-variance-authority for type-safe variant prop handling.
